equations.name: Matrix factorization loss (fit term per rating)
Sigmoid for implicit feedback
equations.note: Sigmoid body = 7n with v4 recip=1n (was 8n with recip=2n)

equations.name: Cosine annealing learning rate
equations.breakdown: div(t,T)(2n) + mul(π,div)(2n) + cos(1n,ceml) + add_pos(1,cos)(3n) + sub(lr_max,lr_min)(2n) + mul(0.5,sub)(2n) + mul(factor,1+cos)(2n) + add_pos(lr_min,prod)(3n) = 17n

observations: Recommendation systems dominated by dot products: O(d) per prediction
BPR loss: 5d+7 — adds only 10 nodes on top of the dot product
Cosine annealing at 17n — optimization metadata costs more than simple exponential decay (5n)
Cross-domain: collaborative filtering dot product = neural network forward pass = any d-dimensional inner product
